property.name: rpc_bind_addresses
property.description: RPC bind interface and port for Kudu tablet server.

property.name: webserver_interface
property.description: Web UI bind interface for Kudu tablet server.

property.name: webserver_port
property.description: Web UI port for Kudu tablet server.

property.name: tserver_master_addrs
property.description: Comma-separated Kudu master host:port list for tablet servers. If empty, Ambari will auto-generate from KUDU_MASTER hosts.

property.name: fs_wal_dir
property.description: WAL directory for Kudu tablet server.

property.name: fs_data_dirs
property.description: Data directories for Kudu tablet server. Comma-separated for multiple paths.

property.name: tserver_additional_flags
property.description: Additional flags appended to tserver.gflagfile (one per line recommended).
